title: vaccinium elvirae
intro: Vaccinium elvirae, also known as the Azores blueberry, is a type of shrub that belongs to the Vaccinium genus and is native to the Azores Islands. The medicinal properties of Vaccinium elvirae include its high antioxidant content, which has been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of consuming Vaccinium elvirae include its potential to improve cardiovascular health, reduce oxidative stress, and support cognitive function. Vaccinium elvirae can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
